revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Law by year cat/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Law by year cat/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Law by year cat/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Law by year cat/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Law by year cat/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Law by year cat/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} Creates a category of the form "YYYY in law", where YYYY is a 4-digit year e.g. * [[:Category:1571 in law]] * [[:Category:2004 in law]] ==Usage== {{Law by year cat}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[Template:Law by year cat]] * [[Template:Law by decade cat]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals established in year category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals disestablished in year category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals established in decade category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals disestablished in decade category header]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Law chronology category header templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Creates a category of the form "YYYY in law", where YYYY is a 4-digit year e.g. * [[:Category:1571 in law]] * [[:Category:2004 in law]] ==Usage== {{Law by year cat}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[Template:Law by year cat]] * [[Template:Law by decade cat]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals established in year category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals disestablished in year category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals established in decade category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals disestablished in decade category header]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Law chronology category header templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Creates a category of the form "YYYY in law", where YYYY is a 4-digit year e.g. * [[:Category:1571 in law]] * [[:Category:2004 in law]] ==Usage== {{Law by year cat}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[Template:Law by year cat]] * [[Template:Law by decade cat]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals established in year category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals disestablished in year category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals established in decade category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals disestablished in decade category header]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Law chronology category header templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Creates a category of the form "YYYY in law", where YYYY is a 4-digit year e.g. * [[:Category:1571 in law]] * [[:Category:2004 in law]] ==Usage== {{Law by year cat}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[Template:Law by year cat]] * [[Template:Law by decade cat]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals established in year category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals disestablished in year category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals established in decade category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals disestablished in decade category header]] {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Law chronology category header templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Creates a category of the form "YYYY in law", where YYYY is a 4-digit year e.g. * [[:Category:1571 in law]] * [[:Category:2004 in law]] ==Usage== {{Law by year cat}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[Template:Law by year cat]] * [[Template:Law by decade cat]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals established in year category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals disestablished in year category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals established in decade category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals disestablished in decade category header]] {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Law chronology category header templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} Creates a category of the form "YYYY in law", where YYYY is a 4-digit year e.g. * [[:Category:1571 in law]] * [[:Category:2004 in law]] ==Usage== {{Law by year cat}} No parameters needed == See also == * [[Template:Law by year cat]] * [[Template:Law by decade cat]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals established in year category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals disestablished in year category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals established in decade category header]] * [[Template:Courts and tribunals disestablished in decade category header]] {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Law chronology category header templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
